The cavern, illuminated by the heart's glow, reveals stalactites and glowing pink flowers. The Regal Woman exclaims 'Ei!' and the Boy responds 'Mama!' as she calls him a 'good child' amid hopeful music. Later, in the same cavern, the Boy confronts the Regal Woman, and the Elderly Man scolds the Boy in Chinese, 'Child, you're confused! How can you be so intimate with a monster?' The Regal Woman fires a red beam from her mouth, striking the Boy, who falls. The Elderly Man, with a white beard, watches from a ledge as the Crab-Like Monster roars. The Regal Woman asks the Boy if he recognizes the Elderly Man, who reveals himself as the Boy's grandpa, but the Boy dismisses him. The Regal Woman intensifies the red beam, throwing the Boy back, who then declares, 'Mommy, I am your good darling!' earning pleased, mocking praise from the Regal Woman. On a stone platform, the Regal Woman asks the Boy how to deal with the 'old man' and his 'boys,' prompting the Boy to emit a Blue Energy Blast that shatters a Glowing Bowl, releasing the Child in Ice. The Boy uses a Glowing Pink Leaf to free the Child, stating, 'Mommy, look how amazing this treasure is! I'll use it to deal with these wild boys, to get revenge for Daddy and Mommy!' Enraged, the Regal Woman fires the red beam again, striking the Boy, who falls, eliciting excited praise and triumphant laughter from the Regal Woman as the Crab-Like Monster roars.

Elderly Man.description: An old man with a long white beard, wearing a brown tunic with a yellow sash and a striped vest, who watches the confrontation from a stone ledge. He speaks in Chinese, calling the Boy 'confused' for being 'intimate with a monster,' and later reveals himself as the Boy's 'grandpa.'

Crab-Like Monster.description: A large, blue, armored creature with a segmented shell and multiple limbs, standing beside the Regal Woman, displaying a fierce expression and roaring in anger.

Boy.description: A young boy with black hair styled in twin buns adorned with green leaves and a pink flower, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, who emits a blue energy blast and uses a glowing pink leaf to free the Child in Ice. He cries out in distress, denies knowing the Elderly Man, calls him 'shameless,' then declares himself the Regal Woman's 'good darling,' and later, with determination, offers to use a 'treasure' to 'deal with these wild boys' for his 'Daddy and Mommy.'

Insect-Like Creatures.description: Small, striped creatures with red eyes and black-and-yellow bodies, scurrying across icy cliffs and later falling into flames, suggesting they are either pests or magical entities being destroyed, now shown trapped in the Spiderweb.

Regal Woman.description: A mysterious, dark-skinned woman with a golden headdress adorned with intricate patterns, wearing ornate golden and black attire, who raises her hand to emit a red beam and stands over the Boy. She speaks with a commanding yet sometimes pleased or mocking tone, questioning the Boy's association with the 'monster' (Elderly Man), asking if he knows the old man, calling the Boy a 'good child,' and later, with excitement and triumphant laughter, encourages him to 'deal with' the 'wild boys.'

Cavern Interior.description: A dim, foreboding cavern with jagged blue rocky walls, illuminated by glowing pink flowers and stalactites, creating an eerie, magical atmosphere, serving as the setting for the confrontation with the Crab-Like Monster and the Regal Woman.

Glowing Pit.description: A circular, deep pit in the center of the cavern floor, outlined with glowing white light, which erupts with energy and transforms into the Glowing Bowl, indicating a magical or ritualistic function, now pulsing with light as the Boy’s beam strikes it, causing it to become a glowing bowl filled with water.

Glowing Gourd.description: A dual-chambered, orange-glowing gourd that emits radiant energy, now shown as part of a series of colorful gourds (orange, yellow, red) hanging from the vine, each glowing with inner light and expressive faces, later shown as a single dark purple gourd that bursts into energy when struck by the Boy’s blue beam.

Glowing Bowl.description: A large, ornate bowl that emerges from the Glowing Pit, decorated with intricate patterns and emitting an ethereal light, filled with water where the Child in Ice floats peacefully, now shattered by the Boy’s beam, releasing the Child in Ice.

Red Beam.description: A bright red beam emitted from the Regal Woman’s mouth, striking the Boy and causing his defeat, indicating a magical or offensive power, now used to shatter the Glowing Bowl and strike the Boy, causing him to fall.

Glowing Pink Leaf.description: A small, glowing pink leaf with visible veins, plucked from the Purple-Skinned Figure’s hand by the Boy, used to strike the creature’s face, causing it to recoil in pain, and later held aloft by the Boy to shatter the ice encasing the Child in Ice, indicating its magical properties.

Child in Ice.description: A young child encased in a block of ice, lying peacefully with a serene expression, wearing a green loincloth and a yellow leaf in his hair, later freed by the Boy’s use of the glowing pink leaf.

Blue Energy Blast.description: A radiant blue energy beam emitted from the Boy’s hand, striking the Glowing Bowl and causing it to shatter, indicating a magical or offensive power.

raw_segments: The scene opens in a dark, icy cavern as the Crab-Like Monster lets out a loud, guttural roar, identified by excited male voices as 'King Ba.' The Elderly Man, wearing a brown tunic, runs frantically across the cavern floor, pursued by a small, striped Insect-Like Creature, as the voices confirm, 'the old man has been caught by us!' The Regal Woman, standing serenely with a hand raised, calmly commands in Chinese, 'You've come at just the right time, bring him up,' as the Elderly Man struggles. The Crab-Like Monster, with a furious expression, growls in a deep male voice, 'You old fellow, your bones are quite hard!' The Regal Woman then speaks in a calm, slightly mocking tone, 'Old man, you've come at just the right time this time, I just happen to have a good show to invite you to watch,' followed by her mocking laughter and a magical shimmering sound. Ominous, building magical music with deep synth bass and ethereal chimes accompanies her gesture, causing a purple gourd hanging from a vine above a deep Glowing Pit to glow with pink light. The gourd then bursts into a radiant explosion with a loud impact sound, releasing a large, glowing pink heart that ascends into the cavern. As the heart hovers above the pit, the Boy emerges from the light, floating upward, crying out in distress, 'Mama! Papa! Mommy, where am I? Why is it so dark?' Ethereal, magical sounds and a deep hum fill the air as the Boy floats toward the Regal Woman, who gently catches him. The Crab-Like Monster watches impassively as the cavern is illuminated by the heart’s glow, casting an ethereal light on the surrounding stalactites and glowing pink flowers. The Regal Woman playfully exclaims 'Ei!' and the Boy happily responds 'Mama!' as she calls him a 'good child,' with hopeful, ethereal music playing in the background.

The scene opens in a dark, icy cavern, filled with jagged blue stalactites and a cold, blue-lit atmosphere, accompanied by distressed child-like cries and grunts. The Boy, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, confronts the Regal Woman, dressed in ornate golden and black attire. A male voice, identified as the Elderly Man, scolds the Boy in Chinese, saying, 'Child, you're confused! How can you be so intimate with a monster?' The Regal Woman raises her hand, and a red beam erupts from her mouth, striking the Boy and causing him to fall. The Elderly Man, with a long white beard, watches in concern from a stone ledge, while the Crab-Like Monster, a large blue armored creature, stands beside the Regal Woman, roaring in anger. The Regal Woman then asks the Boy, 'Good child, look at this old man, do you know him?' The Boy, now on the ground, defiantly responds, 'Don't know him, never seen him before.' The Elderly Man then reveals, 'Child, I am your grandpa!' to which the Boy retorts, 'You're talking nonsense! How shameless!' A sigh follows as the Regal Woman raises her hand again, intensifying the red beam and throwing the Boy back. The Boy then declares, 'Mommy, I am your good darling!' and the Regal Woman responds with a pleased, almost mocking tone, 'What a good child!' followed by chuckling. The scene shifts to a wider view, showing the Boy on a stone platform, facing the Regal Woman and the Crab-Like Monster. The Regal Woman then prompts the Boy, 'Child, this old man brought a bunch of boys here to cause trouble, what do you think we should do?' After a thoughtful hum, the Boy raises his hand, emitting a blue energy blast that strikes the Glowing Bowl, shattering it and releasing the Child in Ice. The Boy then uses the Glowing Pink Leaf to shatter the ice, freeing the Child, who stands with a determined look. The Boy, with renewed determination, states, 'Mommy, look how amazing this treasure is! I'll use it to deal with these wild boys, to get revenge for Daddy and Mommy!' Enraged, the Regal Woman raises her hand again, and the red beam strikes the Boy, causing him to fall. The Regal Woman exclaims excitedly, 'Excellent! Darling!' followed by triumphant laughter as the scene ends with the Boy lying on the ground, the Regal Woman standing over him, and the Crab-Like Monster roaring in anger.

Calabash Brothers.description: Two animated characters, one wearing a blue top and pink loincloth (the Boy), the other wearing a green top and pink loincloth with a green gourd-like adornment, both with stern, defiant expressions, standing atop a cloud-like formation in a dark, icy cavern, raising their fists in unison. One brother makes a high-pitched exclamation 'Shio!', while the Boy declares 'Gege, kan wo de!' (Brother, watch me!) and 'Zai shi jin!' (Again, use strength!).

Rabbit-Like Creature.description: A small, blue-furred, rabbit-like creature with pointed ears, large eyes, and a long snout, wearing an orange tunic with a green collar and black wristbands, holding a trident with a blue spearhead. Visually appearing mischievous as it looks up at the Boy, it audibly sounds aggressive and defiant, calling the others 'wild brats' and threatening not to be 'polite'.

Elderly Man.description: An old man with a long white beard, wearing a brown tunic with a yellow sash and a striped vest, observing the Calabash Brothers from a lower ledge. Visually displaying a concerned and worried expression, he audibly cries out in distress, identifies 'mischievous brats' attacking, and later desperately pleads with the Brother, believing him to be 'possessed'.

Boy.description: A young boy with black hair styled in twin buns adorned with a pink flower, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, displaying a determined and angry expression. He is identified by the Serpentine Creature as 'Ying Sheng Wa' and is described by the Crab-Like Monster as 'ruthless/unfeeling' ('六親不認'). He speaks with a determined young male voice, declaring 'I'm going to show you something powerful' and later confidently stating 'It's okay, I have this!' before chanting an incantation 'As I wish, as I wish, according to my will, quickly manifest! Quickly manifest!' to activate his Golden Object. He also grunts with effort during combat.

Glowing Bowl.description: A large, ornate bowl that emerges from the Glowing Pit, decorated with intricate patterns and emitting an ethereal light, filled with water where the Child in Ice floats peacefully, now shattered by the Boy’s beam, releasing the Child in Ice.

Red Beam.description: A bright red beam emitted from the Regal Woman’s mouth, striking the Boy and causing his defeat, indicating a magical or offensive power, now used to shatter the Glowing Bowl and strike the Boy, causing him to fall.

Glowing Pink Leaf.description: A small, glowing pink leaf with visible veins, plucked from the Purple-Skinned Figure’s hand by the Boy, used to strike the creature’s face, causing it to recoil in pain, and later held aloft by the Boy to shatter the ice encasing the Child in Ice, indicating its magical properties.

Crab-Like Monster.description: A large, blue, armored creature with a segmented shell and multiple limbs. It speaks with a deep, guttural, and angry voice, roaring, urging 'Quickly! Quickly!', warning 'Sixth brother, get out of the way! This kid doesn't recognize anyone, you'll suffer if you fight him head-on!', and angrily questioning 'Which wild kid is hiding and shooting sneak attacks!'.

Child in Ice.description: A young child encased in a block of ice, lying peacefully with a serene expression, wearing a green loincloth and a yellow leaf in his hair. He speaks with a young, distressed male voice, asking 'Mom! What's wrong with you?' and later 'Ah! What's happening!', revealing a familial connection to the Serpentine Creature (who he calls 'Mom').

Regal Woman.description: A mysterious, dark-skinned woman with a golden headdress adorned with intricate patterns, wearing ornate golden and black attire, who raises her hand to emit a red beam and stands over the Boy. She has a distinct high-pitched, cackling voice, speaking dialogue like 'Naniyo!' (What is it?), 'Ni zhen shi hao qi!' (You are so strange!), 'Hao!' (Good!), 'Ai!' (Ah!), 'Oh?' (Surprised), 'Kan ba bao!' (Look at the treasure!), and a series of sounds 'Si! Er! Er!' (Four! Two! Two!), often expressing surprise, frustration, or pleasure with cackles and thoughtful 'Mmm...' sounds.

Blue Energy Blast.description: A radiant blue energy beam emitted from the Boy’s hand, striking the Glowing Bowl and causing it to shatter, indicating a magical or offensive power.

Cavern Interior.description: A dim, foreboding cavern with jagged blue rocky walls, illuminated by glowing pink flowers and stalactites, creating an eerie, magical atmosphere, serving as the setting for the confrontation with the Crab-Like Monster and the Serpentine Creature, and the ritual to free the Child in Ice.

Purple-Skinned Figure.description: A grotesque, purple-skinned, horned creature with a wide, red mouth, lying on a blue, cloud-like surface, clutching a golden, spiral-handled object, appearing to be in a state of deep sleep or enchantment, with its eyes closed and a serene yet sinister expression, now stirred and angered by the Boy’s actions.

Golden Object.description: A golden, spiral-handled object held by the Boy, which emits a bright blue beam of light when activated. The Boy uses an incantation ('As I wish, as I wish, according to my will, quickly manifest! Quickly manifest!') to activate its magical power.

Purple Gourd.description: A dual-chambered, dark purple gourd that emits a radiant purple explosion when struck by the Boy’s blue beam, causing shockwaves and startling nearby creatures.

Glowing Pit.description: A circular, deep pit in the center of the cavern floor, outlined with glowing white light, which erupts with energy and transforms into the Glowing Bowl, indicating a magical or ritualistic function, now pulsing with light as the Boy’s beam strikes it, causing it to become a glowing bowl filled with water.

Serpentine Creature.description: A tall, slender, serpentine humanoid figure with a white face, blue eyes, red lips, and a golden headdress with black horns, wearing ornate golden and orange attire. She speaks with a calm, menacing, and sometimes triumphant female voice, uttering 'Hmph' and a drawn-out 'Eeeeh' while charging her attack, angrily asking 'What are you doing, kid?' and commanding 'Let him go!', later reassuring the Child in Ice that 'This is Ying Sheng Wa causing trouble, quickly punish him!', and finally commanding 'Look at the magic treasure!'. She also expresses surprise with an 'Ah!'.

raw_segments: The scene unfolds in a dark, icy cavern, illuminated by an eerie blue light that highlights jagged blue stalactites, as a crashing sound echoes. The Elderly Man, with his long white beard and striped vest, cries out in distress, exclaiming, "Pa! Pa! Pa!" before warning that "The mischievous brats are attacking!" On a rocky outcrop, atop a cloud-like formation, the Calabash Brothers stand defiantly, raising their fists. The Boy, in his blue top and pink loincloth with a pink flower in his hair, holding a dark purple gourd, confidently declares, "Don't panic! Watch me deal with their bones!" He then angrily demands, "You're at death's door, still not returning my grandpa? Quickly return my brother!" and threatens, "Otherwise, I'm going to breathe fire! I'm going to spit water!" A blue-furred, rabbit-like creature with large ears, an orange tunic, and a trident appears, looking up with a mischievous grin, then aggressively warns, "You bunch of wild brats, dare to come here and cause trouble! I won't be polite to you!" The Boy, turning to face the concerned Elderly Man on a lower ledge, points accusingly at his brother, asking, "Brother, why have you lost your mind, helping those two demons speak?" and urgently adds, "Brother, you're possessed! Why are you with demons?" His brother, wearing a green top and pink loincloth, defiantly retorts, "Hey! YOU are the demons! I'm mom's good baby! Whoever dares to bully my mom and dad, I'll crush them to smithereens!" The Elderly Man, shocked, pleads, "Child, you're possessed! Wake up quickly!" but the Brother, still defiant, threatens, "You old geezer, if you keep spouting nonsense, I'll make you regret it!" The cavern's icy textures and the escalating verbal conflict emphasize the danger and urgency of the moment, as the Calabash Brothers' unity shatters amidst accusations and threats.

The scene opens with a close-up of the Calabash Brother in green, displaying a fierce, determined expression as intense, dramatic music begins to build. He is soon joined by the Calabash Brother in blue, and together they stand defiantly atop a cloud-like formation in a dark, icy cavern, raising their fists in unison with a whooshing sound. One of the brothers exclaims "Shio!" as the environment shifts to reveal a wider view of the cavern. Here, the Regal Woman, adorned in ornate golden and black attire with a headdress featuring black horns, stands beside the Crab-Like Monster, who lets out a deep, guttural roar, "Ao! Ao!". The Regal Woman cackles, uttering "Naniyo!" (What is it?) and "Ni zhen shi hao qi!" (You are so strange!), as the two Calabash Brothers confront them, leaping through flames and icy terrain, showcasing their agility and power. The Regal Woman raises her hand, emitting a red beam that strikes the Boy, causing him to fall. Despite being struck, the Boy remains resolute, holding a dark purple gourd that glows with energy. He declares, "Gege, kan wo de!" (Brother, watch me!) and activates the gourd, unleashing a blue energy blast with a powerful whoosh and impact sound. The Regal Woman reacts with a surprised "Oh?" and a cackle as the blast shatters a glowing bowl, releasing a child encased in ice. The child, wearing a green loincloth and a yellow leaf in his hair, floats peacefully in the water. The Boy then uses a glowing pink leaf, plucked from the Purple-Skinned Figure’s hand, to shatter the ice, freeing the child. The Regal Woman, now sounding frustrated, utters "Mmm..." and "Ni zhe ge hun..." (You this confused...) as the scene concludes with the Boy and his brother standing triumphantly, their fists raised, while the Regal Woman and Crab-Like Monster retreat in defeat. The cavern is illuminated by the glow of the shattered bowl and the freed child, creating a sense of victory and hope, as the dramatic music fades.

The segment opens with the Boy, his face contorted in anger and determination, declaring in a young, determined voice, "I'm going to show you something powerful!" as he raises his hand amidst charging energy sounds. The scene quickly shifts to the Serpentine Creature, her face serene yet menacing, uttering a calm "Hmph" and a drawn-out "Eeeeh" as she charges her attack, her glowing blue eyes and golden headdress prominent. She raises her hand to emit a red beam, accompanied by energy whooshes and an impact sound, causing the Boy to grunt in surprise. The Crab-Like Monster, with a deep, guttural roar, and the Serpentine Creature, angrily asking "What are you doing, kid?" and commanding "Let him go!", are heard as the Boy, now in a wide shot in a dark, icy cavern, wields a Golden Object with a spiral handle. He emits a blue beam, accompanied by more energy sounds and impacts, striking a dark purple gourd, which bursts into a radiant purple explosion, sending shockwaves and startling nearby creatures. The Boy, grunting with effort, then raises the gourd high, and a bright pink energy blast erupts, illuminating the cavern. The Serpentine Creature, standing beside the roaring Crab-Like Monster, raises her hand again, emitting a red beam that strikes the Boy, causing him to fall, while she utters a triumphant "Ahhh." The Child in Ice, encased in ice, cries out in a young, distressed voice, "Mom! What's wrong with you?", revealing his connection to the Serpentine Creature. She calmly reassures him, "This is Ying Sheng Wa causing trouble, quickly punish him!", as the Crab-Like Monster urges "Quickly! Quickly!". The Crab-Like Monster then warns, "Sixth brother, get out of the way! This kid doesn't recognize anyone, you'll suffer if you fight him head-on!", implying the Boy is ruthless. The Boy, now on the ground, confidently states, "It's okay, I have this!" and raises the Golden Object again, chanting "As I wish, as I wish, according to my will, quickly manifest! Quickly manifest!" amidst magical charging sounds. He emits a blue beam that strikes a large, ornate Glowing Bowl, causing it to shatter with intense magical sounds. The bowl, filled with water, releases the Child in Ice, who floats peacefully. The Boy, holding the Glowing Pink Leaf aloft, uses it to shatter the ice encasing the child. The child, now free, lies peacefully on the ground, his face serene, asking in distress, "Ah! What's happening!". The scene ends with the Boy standing triumphantly in the cavern, the child free, and the Serpentine Creature, who commanded "Look at the magic treasure!", and the Crab-Like Monster retreating into the shadows, as magical energy sounds continue.

event_blocks.summary: Within a dark, icy cavern, Ruyi, a young boy in a blue top and pink loincloth, defiantly holds a dark purple gourd and excitedly calls out to the Elderly Man, his father, who lovingly praises him. The Regal Woman observes with a sarcastic laugh. Ruyi unleashes a blue energy blast from the gourd, striking and cracking a stone slab above, which falls with a loud impact, alarming the Regal Woman. A small, blue-furred, rabbit-like creature with a trident appears, chattering and scampering. The Elderly Man exclaims in distress as the Regal Woman fires a red beam, striking Ruyi, who falls backward. She triumphantly grabs the crying boy, taunting the Elderly Man with "an eye for an eye" as she drags Ruyi away. The Elderly Man, frozen in worry, urges Ruyi to come quickly, but Ruyi grunts in pain. The Regal Woman mocks the Elderly Man's age before departing. Later, the Elderly Man, flanked by bat-like creatures, pleads with someone about brotherly affection. The Boy, determined, is urged by a sharp female voice and a male voice to act. He hesitantly interacts with the Regal Woman, who commands him to collect. The Boy activates the purple gourd, unleashing a purple energy blast. The Regal Woman smiles, raising her hand as if to counter. The Boy then uses a glowing pink leaf to strike a purple-skinned, horned figure, causing it to wail. The Regal Woman, smug, prepares to strike with red energy, telling the Boy to watch her deal with them. The Boy raises the pink leaf again as the Regal Woman’s hand emits a red beam, striking the Boy and causing him to fall, while the Elderly Man watches in anguish amidst an eerie orchestral score. In another part of the cavern, the Regal Woman, in ornate attire, coaxingly asks the Boy for his treasure, mocking him. A Crab-Like Monster joins in the taunting. The Regal Woman shouts, "Look at the magic weapon!" and fires a red beam, striking the Boy, who falls screaming. The Crab-Like Monster laughs. The Regal Woman then uses the purple gourd to unleash a pink energy blast, propelling the screaming Boy towards a glowing pit, which transforms into a large bowl filled with water containing a Child in Ice. The bowl erupts with blue energy, revealing a glowing blue orb. The Regal Woman, smirking, holds the purple gourd aloft. Both she and the Crab-Like Monster gasp in surprise as the Boy's power grows, despite him lying defeated. The cavern is illuminated by vibrant pink and blue energy.

Rabbit-Like Creature.description: A small, blue-furred, rabbit-like creature with pointed ears, large eyes, and a long snout, wearing an orange tunic with a green collar and black wristbands, holding a trident with a blue spearhead. It appears mischievous as it observes the scene, accompanied by quick, light, chattering/scampering sounds.

Elderly Man.description: An old man with a long white beard, wearing a brown tunic with a yellow sash and a striped vest, standing in a dark cavern with a deeply worried expression, tears streaming down his face as he watches the confrontation unfold, speaking in distressed and pleading Chinese about brotherly affection and conflict.

Boy.description: A young boy with black hair styled in twin buns adorned with a pink flower, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, holding a dark purple gourd and later a glowing pink leaf, displaying a determined expression as he unleashes energy blasts and strikes the Purple-Skinned Figure. He makes distressed sounds and screams in pain when struck by energy blasts, falling backward and being propelled across the cavern.

Regal Woman.description: A mysterious, dark-skinned woman with a golden headdress adorned with intricate patterns, wearing ornate golden and black attire, who speaks in a coaxing, manipulative, and later mocking tone in Chinese, then shouts commanding phrases like 'Look at the magic weapon!' and 'Go!', emitting a red beam and unleashing a pink energy blast from a purple gourd, laughing maniacally, and finally gasping in surprise. She watches with a smug, almost amused expression, and holds the purple gourd aloft.

Cavern Interior.description: A dim, foreboding cavern with jagged blue rocky walls, illuminated by faint light, creating an eerie, magical atmosphere, serving as the setting for the confrontation between the Boy and the Regal Woman.

Red Beam.description: A bright red beam emitted from the Regal Woman’s hand, striking the Boy and causing his defeat, indicating a magical or offensive power, now used to shatter the Glowing Bowl and strike the Boy, causing him to fall.

Glowing Pink Leaf.description: A small, glowing pink leaf with visible veins, plucked from the Purple-Skinned Figure’s hand by the Boy, used to strike the creature’s face, causing it to recoil in pain, and later held aloft by the Boy to confront the Regal Woman.

Purple Energy Blast.description: A sudden, radiant purple explosion emanating from the dark purple gourd when activated by the Boy, streaking across the cavern and startling nearby creatures, indicating a powerful magical attack, accompanied by distinct whooshing and impact sounds.

Bat-Like Creature.description: A small, black, bat-like creature with glowing blue eyes, a red collar, and a long, curved antenna, which stands beside the Elderly Man, observing the scene with a menacing presence.

Purple-Skinned Figure.description: A grotesque, purple-skinned, horned creature with a wide, red mouth, lying on a blue, cloud-like surface, clutching a golden, spiral-handled object, appearing to be in a state of deep sleep or enchantment, now stirred and angered by the Boy’s actions, emitting a loud, high-pitched wail when struck.

Blue Bat-Like Creature.description: A blue-skinned, bat-like creature with large blue wings, a red scarf, and a yellow chest emblem, who stands beside the Elderly Man, holding a trident and pointing accusingly at the trapped Elderly Man.

Glowing Bowl.description: A large, ornate bowl that emerges from the Glowing Pit, decorated with intricate patterns and emitting an ethereal light, filled with water where the Child in Ice floats peacefully, now shattered by the Boy’s beam, releasing the Child in Ice.

Golden Orb.description: A glowing golden orb that appears in the Regal Woman’s hand, illuminating the cave and revealing hidden details, suggesting a source of magical light or power, now shown as a weapon or tool of dominance.

Child in Ice.description: A young child encased in a block of ice, lying peacefully with a serene expression, wearing a green loincloth and a yellow leaf in his hair, later freed by the Boy’s use of the glowing pink leaf.

Blue Energy Blast.description: A radiant blue energy beam emitted from the Boy’s hand, striking the Glowing Bowl and causing it to shatter, indicating a magical or offensive power.

Glowing Pit.description: A circular, deep pit in the center of the cavern floor, outlined with glowing white light, which erupts with energy and transforms into the Glowing Bowl, indicating a magical or ritualistic function, now pulsing with light as the Boy’s beam strikes it, causing it to become a glowing bowl filled with water.

Crab-Like Monster.description: A large, blue, armored creature with a segmented shell and multiple limbs, standing beside the Regal Woman, displaying a fierce expression and roaring in anger with guttural growls, speaking in a deep voice in Chinese, laughing deeply, and finally gasping in surprise and growling again. Later seen retreating into the shadows.

Purple Gourd.description: A dual-chambered, dark purple gourd that emits a radiant purple explosion when struck by the Boy’s blue beam, causing shockwaves and startling nearby creatures.

raw_segments: The scene opens in a dark, icy cavern with jagged blue stalactites and a cold, shadowy atmosphere, illuminated by faint blue light. A young boy, Ruyi, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, stands defiantly on a rocky ledge, holding a dark purple gourd. He excitedly calls out "Papa, look what this is!" to the Elderly Man, who, with a long white beard and striped vest, watches from a lower ledge, lovingly calling him "Ruyi, my precious Ruyi!" and proudly remarking, "Good, my child, you're really something!" The Regal Woman, in a golden headdress and ornate golden-black attire, observes with a sarcastic laugh. Ruyi raises his arm, and with a whirring sound and building magical energy, a blue energy blast erupts from the gourd, striking a large, ornate stone slab above him, causing it to crack and fall with a loud impact and crumbling sounds. The impact sends shockwaves, startling the Regal Woman, whose expression shifts to alarm. Quick, light chattering and scampering sounds accompany a small, blue-furred, rabbit-like creature with a trident, appearing mischievous as it observes. The Elderly Man exclaims, "Oh no! Not good!" as the Regal Woman raises her hand, emitting a red beam that strikes Ruyi, causing him to fall backward with a pained grunt. She triumphantly commands, "Come here!" and quickly grabs him, holding him close while Ruyi cries out "Papa!" in distress. The Regal Woman, with a mocking "Hmph!", then turns and walks away, dragging the struggling Ruyi with her, taunting the Elderly Man with a sarcastic laugh, "This is called 'an eye for an eye'!" The Elderly Man, frozen in worry, urgently calls, "My child, come quickly!" but Ruyi continues to grunt in pain. The Regal Woman further mocks the Elderly Man, "At such an old age, still picking your nose? Aren't you afraid people will laugh at you?", leaving him defeated as he mutters, "You..." The cavern’s eerie atmosphere emphasizes the tension and danger of the confrontation.

The scene unfolds in a dark, icy cavern with jagged blue rock formations, where the Elderly Man stands with a deeply worried expression, tears forming in his eyes, pleading in Chinese, "I won't, I won't blame you, but you don't even care about your brotherly affection... Making everyone kill each other, you brothers grew up together, like one vine." A small black bat-like creature and a blue bat-like creature holding a trident flank him. The camera cuts to a close-up of a young boy with black hair in twin buns adorned with a pink flower, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, who appears determined and focused, letting out a distressed wail. A sharp female voice urges, "Child, you're confused!" The Boy responds, crying, "Mom, my heart aches, it's unbearable... This old man, he looks familiar, as if I've seen him somewhere." Another male voice interjects, "Don't talk nonsense!" followed by an aggressive command, "Yes, what are you standing there for? Quickly grab them!" The Boy, hesitant at first, then determined, is shown interacting with the tall, serpentine Regal Woman, who stands beside him with a calm, almost mocking demeanor. As the Regal Woman commands, "Quickly collect!" the Boy raises and activates a dark purple gourd, unleashing a radiant purple energy blast with a distinct whooshing and impact sound that streaks across the cavern. The Regal Woman reacts with a slight smile, raising her hand as if to counter or absorb the energy. The Boy then shifts his focus, holding a glowing pink leaf aloft, which he uses to strike the purple-skinned, horned figure lying on a blue cloud-like surface, causing it to recoil with a loud, high-pitched wail. The Regal Woman watches with a smug expression, her hand glowing with red energy as she prepares to strike, remarking calmly, "Good child, you're really capable. From now on, just watch me deal with them. You don't need to worry about it." The Boy, undeterred, raises the pink leaf again, and the scene ends with the Regal Woman’s hand emitting a red beam, striking the Boy and causing him to fall, while the Elderly Man looks on in anguish, all set against a dramatic, eerie orchestral score with cavern echoes.

The scene opens in a dark, cavernous environment with jagged red and purple rock formations, illuminated by an eerie, glowing ambiance, accompanied by a child's exclamation and a deep, booming laugh that transitions into a high-pitched, almost maniacal cackle from the Regal Woman. Eerie, magical background music builds tension as the Regal Woman, adorned in ornate golden and black attire with a headdress, stands atop a stone platform, her expression smug and commanding. Below, the Boy, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, stands defiantly, holding a dark purple gourd. The Boy's voice asks, "Mama, what is this for?", to which the Regal Woman calmly replies, "Refining the Seven Star Elixir." When the Boy inquires further, "Refining the Seven Star Elixir for what?", she explains, "Eat the Seven Star Elixir, fear neither heaven nor earth." The Boy eagerly declares, "I want to eat it too!", and the Regal Woman responds with an amused, confident tone, "Hmm, that's natural. How could I leave you out?" As the background music intensifies with magical sound effects, the Regal Woman raises her hand, emitting a red beam that strikes the Boy, causing him to recoil with a gasp. She sharply exclaims, "Huh?", then urgently commands, "Naughty child, quickly throw those wild brats into the furnace!", as roaring furnace sounds and magical hums fill the air. The camera then focuses on a large, ornate brazier in the center of the cavern, which erupts with a burst of blue energy, transforming into a glowing bowl. The Boy, now holding a glowing pink leaf, charges forward, shouting "Hey! Watch me!" with determination, unleashing a blue energy blast that shatters the bowl amidst intense magical energy and a child's cry, releasing a child encased in ice. The Regal Woman watches with a smirk, then raises her hand again, this time summoning a golden orb that illuminates the cavern. The Boy, undeterred, raises the glowing pink leaf, confronting the Regal Woman as the cavern trembles with magical energy. The Regal Woman's high-pitched, maniacal laughter returns, and she remarks with amusement, "Naughty child, your precious brother is truly divine!", as her expression shifts to one of surprise while the Boy’s power grows.

In a dark, cavernous setting with jagged purple and red rock formations, the Regal Woman, adorned in ornate golden and black attire with a headdress, speaks in a coaxing yet manipulative tone, asking the Boy in Chinese, "How about letting Mama see it?" The Boy responds with a distressed sound as she continues, "I'll only let you see it for a while. You have to give it back to me immediately," followed by her mocking laughter, "What a silly child, will Mama still want your treasure?" The Crab-Like Monster, roaring in anger, adds in a deep voice, "Oh, what a good treasure," as the Regal Woman laughs again. The Boy, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth with a pink flower in his hair, holds a dark purple gourd and glares defiantly. The Regal Woman then shouts, "Look at the magic weapon!" as she raises her hand, emitting a red beam that strikes the Boy, causing him to fall backward amidst his screams of pain. The Crab-Like Monster growls, then laughs deeply. The Regal Woman shouts "Go!" and raises the purple gourd, unleashing a powerful pink energy blast that propels the Boy across the cavern, his prolonged screams echoing as the energy beam strikes a glowing pit with a loud impact. The Regal Woman laughs maniacally, joined by the Crab-Like Monster's deep laughter. A powerful energy surge erupts as the pit transforms into a large, ornate bowl filled with water, where a Child in Ice floats peacefully. Eerie, high-pitched string music plays as the bowl erupts with blue energy, revealing a glowing blue orb that hovers above the pit. The Regal Woman, smirking, gestures triumphantly as the Crab-Like Monster watches. The scene shifts to a close-up of the Regal Woman’s face, her expression one of amusement and control, as she holds the purple gourd aloft. Both the Regal Woman and the Crab-Like Monster gasp in surprise, followed by the monster's growl. The Crab-Like Monster, still enraged, stands beside her, while the Boy lies defeated on the ground. The cavern is illuminated by the vibrant pink and blue energy, creating a dramatic and magical atmosphere.

event_blocks.summary: In a dim, cavernous environment, an Elderly Man, clutching a glowing blue orb, faced a Bat-Like Creature and a Rabbit-Like Creature, who threatened to throw him into a furnace. The Elderly Man defiantly refused to let them refine the Seven-Heart Elixir and lamented the disloyalty of the seven Calabash Brothers. He then revealed a plan to make them change their minds, prompting surprise from the creatures. The Rabbit-Like Creature demanded the Elderly Man's release, and as a thud and metallic clang sounded, the Elderly Man summoned a radiant, multi-colored lotus-shaped object resembling a glowing bowl, which emitted bright sparks and powerful light as he chanted for unity against the demons. The creatures initially mocked but then panicked, realizing they had been tricked. The scene shifted to a dark cavern with a glowing blue orb descending and colorful lights converging into a hand, then transferring to a large ornate blue brazier, causing it to glow intensely. Colorful hearts multiplied into a large red heart that exploded, from which the seven Calabash Brothers emerged atop a lotus-shaped platform. The Elderly Man, holding the bowl, was threatened by an aggressive male voice, prompting the children to cry out for their grandfather. He urged them to eliminate the demons, and they appeared united and fierce in a fiery environment. The Boy, emerging from a glowing pit, shattered a stone door with a blue energy blast. Pursued by the Regal Woman and a Crab-Like Monster, the Boy was struck by a red beam but retaliated with a purple energy blast, shattering a glowing bowl. The Regal Woman and Crab-Like Monster retreated, with the Regal Woman summoning a golden orb. The scene transitioned to a hidden pool where a Purple-Skinned Figure sat at a stone table. The Boy discovered a reflection of a Serpentine Creature and used a glowing pink leaf to strike the Purple-Skinned Figure, causing it to recoil. The Boy then confronted the Regal Woman, holding the glowing pink leaf aloft, as she confidently ordered the demon's destruction.

Glowing Bowl.description: A large, ornate bowl that emerges from the Elderly Man’s hands, decorated with flame-like petals in rainbow hues, emitting bright sparks and radiant light, and pulsing with energy as it is activated, suggesting a magical or ritualistic function, which is shattered with a distinct crack by the Boy's attack.

Rabbit-Like Creature.description: A small, blue-furred, rabbit-like creature with pointed ears, large eyes, and a long snout, wearing an orange tunic with a green collar and black wristbands, holding a trident with a blue spearhead. It reacts with a high-pitched gasp, then speaks with an assertive female voice, challenging the Elderly Man's abilities. It later emits mocking evil laughter, but then cries out in a panicked female voice, realizing they've been tricked, and lets out a high-pitched shriek as the glowing bowl's power intensifies.

Elderly Man.description: An old man with a long white beard, wearing a brown tunic with a yellow sash and a striped vest, standing in a dark cavern with a deeply worried expression, holding a glowing blue orb and later a radiant, multi-colored lotus-shaped bowl, which he activates with both hands, causing it to emit bright sparks and light, and making soft, worried 'huh huh' sounds.

Glowing Blue Orb.description: A small, spherical object with a deep blue glow, held gently in the Elderly Man’s hands, pulsing with light as it is transferred, and later used to activate the glowing bowl, which transforms into a radiant, multi-colored lotus-shaped object with flame-like petals.

Bat-Like Creature.description: A small, black, bat-like creature with glowing blue eyes, a red collar, and a long, curved antenna, standing beside the Elderly Man, observing the scene with a menacing presence, and recoiling in alarm as the glowing bowl activates, emitting a high-pitched, almost squeaky sound.

Calabash Brothers.description: Seven animated children, each with a distinct colored top (blue, green, red, yellow, pink, orange, purple) and pink loincloth, standing atop a lotus-shaped platform with flame-like petals, emerging from a radiant explosion, displaying fierce, determined expressions as they prepare for battle, one of whom lets out a sharp 'Hai!' shout.

Fire.description: Bright orange flames that erupt from the ground, engulfing the area and revealing the Boy’s emergence, adding urgency and magical energy to the scene, now shown behind the Calabash Brothers as they stand united.

Glowing Brazier.description: An ornate, dark-colored brazier with a flame that emits a vibrant green light with a blue, lotus-shaped core, suspended on a stone platform in a dark cavern, reacting to the magical energy transfer and glowing with intricate patterns.

Cavern Interior.description: A dim, foreboding cavern with jagged blue rocky walls, illuminated by faint light, creating an eerie, magical atmosphere, serving as the setting for the confrontation between the Boy and the Regal Woman, now shown with glowing blue crystals and a stone platform.

Red Beam.description: A bright red beam emitted from the Regal Woman’s hand, striking the Boy and causing his defeat, indicating a magical or offensive power, now used to shatter the Glowing Bowl and strike the Boy, causing him to fall.

Crab-Like Monster.description: A large, blue, armored creature with a segmented shell and multiple limbs, standing beside the Regal Woman, displaying a fierce expression and roaring in anger, later seen retreating into the shadows, emitting loud, guttural 'Thong ah!' roars, and echoing the Regal Woman's declaration, 'You can't escape!' (你们跑不了了!).

Purple Energy Blast.description: A sudden, radiant purple explosion emanating from the dark purple gourd when activated by the Boy, streaking across the cavern and startling nearby creatures, indicating a powerful magical attack, accompanied by a powerful 'Poom!' sound.

Glowing Pink Leaf.description: A small, glowing pink leaf with visible veins, plucked from the Purple-Skinned Figure’s hand by the Boy, used to strike the creature’s face, causing it to recoil in pain, and later held aloft by the Boy to confront the Regal Woman.

Boy.description: A young boy with black hair styled in twin buns adorned with a pink flower, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, holding a dark purple gourd and later a glowing pink leaf, displaying a determined expression as he unleashes energy blasts and strikes the Purple-Skinned Figure, making whooshing sounds as he moves, powerful 'Hai!' shouts when attacking, crying out in distress with 'Bu hao!' (Not good!), and letting out a determined 'Hai!' when striking.

Stone Door.description: A large, ancient-looking stone door embedded in the cliffside, studded with golden rivets, which creaks open to reveal a dark cavern, serving as a gateway to danger and mystery, now shown with a carved face and two large, almond-shaped eyes, and a sign above reading '迷镜宫', which shatters loudly from an energy blast.

Regal Woman.description: A mysterious, dark-skinned woman with a golden headdress adorned with intricate patterns, wearing ornate golden and black attire, who raises her hand to emit a red beam, strikes the Boy, and watches with a smug, almost amused expression, later summoning a golden orb, letting out a sharp 'Hai!' sound when attacking, speaking with a commanding, slightly mocking tone, saying 'You can't escape!' (你们跑不了了!), confidently declaring 'Look at my treasure!' (看我法宝!), and finally proclaiming 'Destroy the demon!' (消灭妖精!).

Hidden Pool.description: A secluded pool surrounded by blue, coral-like formations, where a purple-skinned, horned figure sits at a stone table, eating from plates of food, and where the Boy discovers a reflection of the Serpentine Creature.

Purple-Skinned Figure.description: A grotesque, purple-skinned, horned creature with a wide, red mouth, lying on a blue, cloud-like surface, clutching a golden, spiral-handled object, appearing to be in a state of deep sleep or enchantment, now stirred and angered by the Boy’s actions, emitting a guttural growl while eating, and crying out in pain with 'Aaaah!' when struck.

Dining Table.description: A long, red stone table with plates of food and a blue brazier, set in a cavernous hall with glowing pink flowers and stalactites, where the Serpentine Creature and Crab-Like Monster are seated, observing the Boy’s defeat.

raw_segments: The scene opens in a dim, cavernous environment with jagged red and purple rock formations, creating a foreboding atmosphere, accompanied by an eerie, low-frequency hum. An Elderly Man, with his long white beard, brown tunic, and striped vest, stands with a deeply worried expression, flanked by two creatures: a Bat-Like Creature with glowing blue eyes, a red collar, and a long antenna, and a blue Rabbit-Like Creature wearing an orange tunic with a green collar and holding a trident. The Bat-Like Creature lets out an evil laugh, then a deep, menacing male voice (likely the Bat-Like Creature) threatens, "Old man, I'll throw you into the furnace, so you'll know what's what." The Elderly Man, clutching a small, glowing blue orb, defiantly states, "Even if you burn me to ashes, don't even think about refining the Seven-Heart Elixir." He continues, frustrated, "These seven Calabash Brothers, you've all messed them up, making them disloyal. How can they ever come together?" A high-pitched gasp from the Rabbit-Like Creature follows. The Elderly Man then confidently declares, "I do have a way to make them change their minds," prompting surprised grunts from the creatures. The Rabbit-Like Creature, in an assertive female voice, demands, "Let go of the old man! I'd like to see how capable he really is!" A thud and metallic clang are heard. The Elderly Man raises his hands, and a radiant, multi-colored lotus-shaped object—resembling a glowing bowl with flame-like petals—emerges, emitting bright sparks, accompanied by his grunt of effort. The Bat-Like Creature emits a low growl, and both creatures react with alarm, recoiling as the orb glows intensely, making questioning grunts. The Elderly Man then holds the glowing bowl with both hands, and it radiates a powerful, shimmering light, suggesting a magical ritual or activation. He begins to chant powerfully, "Connect hearts, connect hearts, become one heart. With him, they can unite their efforts, eliminate you demons!" The Bat-Like and Rabbit-Like Creatures respond with mocking evil laughter, but their expressions quickly shift from curiosity to fear as the energy builds. The Rabbit-Like Creature then cries out in a panicked female voice, "We've been tricked!" followed by a panicked male exclamation from the Bat-Like Creature and a high-pitched shriek from the Rabbit-Like Creature. The lighting shifts from dark reds to vibrant, glowing hues as the bowl’s power intensifies, culminating in a loud, resonant magical sound, indicating a pivotal moment of transformation or summoning.

The sequence opens in a dark, cavernous environment with jagged red and purple rock formations, where a large ornate blue brazier sits atop a stone platform, accompanied by ethereal, magical music and twinkling sounds. A mysterious, glowing blue orb descends from above, followed by a series of colorful, floating lights—red, blue, yellow, and green—that converge into a hand, suggesting magical energy being gathered amidst building suspense in the music. The lights then transfer into the brazier, causing it to glow with intricate patterns and emit a radiant blue light, punctuated by whooshing and magical energy effects. The scene transitions to a black background where colorful hearts—red, blue, yellow, green, pink, and orange—float and multiply, culminating in a large red heart that bursts into a radiant orange explosion with a loud whoosh and sustained magical hum. From this explosion, seven small, determined-looking children, the Calabash Brothers, emerge, each with a distinct colored top and pink loincloth, standing atop a lotus-shaped platform with flame-like petals, as the music becomes dramatic and wondrous. A close-up shows a hand holding a glowing blue orb, which is then placed into a large, ornate bowl that transforms into a radiant, multi-colored lotus-shaped object, accompanied by shimmering magical sounds. The Elderly Man, with a long white beard and traditional robes, appears, holding the bowl with both hands as it emits bright sparks. He is then shown in a dark cavern, surrounded by glowing blue crystals and a bat-like creature with glowing blue eyes, as the bowl activates and releases a burst of light. An aggressive male voice is heard threatening, "Who dares not come, I'll kill this old man first!", followed by the high-pitched cries of the children, "Grandpa! Grandpa!", expressing their distress. The Elderly Man, in a distressed and urgent tone, responds, "Children, don't mind me! Quickly eliminate the demons!" as the children continue to cry out. The final frames show the seven children, now fully formed, standing together in a fiery, red-orange environment, their expressions fierce and united, as they prepare for battle. The scene ends with a close-up of one of the children, the Boy, with a determined look, as flames erupt behind him, signaling the beginning of their heroic journey amidst continued magical sound effects.

A radiant explosion of golden light erupts, accompanied by triumphant, heroic music reaching a crescendo, as the Calabash Brothers appear united atop a lotus-shaped platform, their determined expressions illuminated by flames, one of them letting out a sharp 'Hai!' shout. The scene shifts to a dark cavern, the heroic music fading into a tense, low hum, as the Elderly Man, with a worried 'huh huh' sound, holds a glowing blue orb. A high-pitched, almost squeaky sound emanates from the Bat-Like Creature observing menacingly beside him. The Boy, wearing a blue top and pink loincloth, emerges from a glowing pit with a whooshing sound, letting out a powerful 'Hai!' shout as he strikes a stone door with a blue energy blast, causing it to shatter loudly. He then leaps across jagged blue cliffs, accompanied by the sound of wind, pursued by the Regal Woman and Crab-Like Monster, who stand atop a rocky outcrop, the monster letting out loud, guttural roars of 'Thong ah! Thong ah! Thong ah!'. The Regal Woman raises her hand, emitting a red beam with a sharp 'Hai!' sound that strikes the Boy, causing him to cry out in pain as he falls. The Boy, now holding a dark purple gourd, retaliates with a tense, drawn-out vocalization ('Uuueeeh!') before unleashing a powerful purple energy blast with a 'Poom!' sound, shattering a glowing bowl with a distinct crack and startling the creatures, who emit high-pitched, panicked noises. The Regal Woman and Crab-Like Monster are seen retreating into the shadows, the Regal Woman declaring with a commanding, slightly mocking tone, 'You can't escape!' (你们跑不了了!), a sentiment echoed by the Crab-Like Monster. The Boy cries out in distress, exclaiming 'Bu hao!' (Not good!), as the Regal Woman confidently declares, 'Look at my treasure!' (看我法宝!), while summoning a golden orb. The Boy continues to express distress with another 'Bu hao!'. The scene transitions to a hidden pool, accompanied by a distinct slithering, hissing sound, where a Purple-Skinned Figure sits at a stone table, eating from plates of food, emitting a guttural growl. The Boy discovers a reflection of the Serpentine Creature. The Boy then uses a glowing pink leaf, letting out a determined 'Hai!' as he strikes the Purple-Skinned Figure, causing it to recoil with a pained 'Aaaah!'. The sequence ends with the Boy holding the glowing pink leaf aloft, confronting the Regal Woman, who watches with a smug expression and confidently declares, 'Destroy the demon!' (消灭妖精!).

event_blocks.summary: The Boy, clad in a green top and pink loincloth with a flower in his hair, stands defiantly on a rocky outcrop amidst a cold, mountainous landscape, confronting an unseen threat with intense, dramatic music and foreign chanting, including a call to 'Exterminate the demon!'. His determined eyes are focused as he leaps across jagged cliffs, grunting 'Hoi! Hoi!' and narrowly avoiding falling debris, landing on a ledge with a triumphant exclamation. He then lifts a massive boulder with superhuman strength, grunting with exertion. The scene shifts to a dark cavern where a grotesque, purple-skinned, horned figure sleeps, clutching a golden spiral-handled object. The Boy approaches and uses a glowing pink leaf to strike the figure, causing a sharp impact sound, a guttural roar, high-pitched shrieks, and distorted vocalizations as the creature recoils. The Boy activates the golden object, emitting a blue beam with a powerful charging sound that strikes a dark purple gourd hanging from a vine. The gourd explodes in a radiant purple blast with a loud 'BOOM!' and shockwaves, revealing a hidden path as the Boy, holding the glowing pink leaf aloft, stands triumphantly amidst settling debris and a mournful wail. The environment transitions from icy peaks to a dark cavern, then to a glowing, magical realm with floating flowers and ethereal hands, underscored by an ethereal hum and shimmering magical sounds. The Boy then casts a spell, emitting a glowing pink orb from his hand with a high-pitched shout and a whoosh sound, accompanied by intense, building orchestral music. A wide shot reveals jagged, purple-hued mountains where a small, dark purple gourd floats, glowing faintly. After another high-pitched shout, a powerful impact sound and a sustained, high-pitched magical energy hum precede a deep, rumbling explosion as the gourd descends into a crevice, followed by a massive, echoing explosion with a deep boom and shimmering sounds, erupting in a vibrant, multicolored energy burst. This explosion gives way to the emergence of the Calabash Brothers—seven animated children in distinct colored tops and pink loincloths—leaping from the cliffs in unison with raised arms, accompanied by joyful children's laughter and a 'boing' sound. They gather mid-air, forming a heroic cluster before descending toward the glowing crevice. The camera pulls back to reveal the mountain landscape bathed in warm golden light, with the central peak glowing radiantly, as majestic, soaring orchestral music conveys wonder and triumph. Chinese credit text appears sequentially in red characters over the landscape, listing production roles, while a female vocalist sings emotionally in Mandarin. The sequence concludes with a static, painted mountain landscape featuring a prominent multicolored peak, over which white Chinese characters listing production and post-production credits scroll vertically. A powerful and emotional female choir sings in Chinese with an operatic, soaring style, creating a ceremonial atmosphere. Technical credits for post-production support, the Dolby Digital logo, and the Shanghai Film Studio logo appear at the bottom, all underscored by the continuing choral performance, marking the film's narrative conclusion.

Floating Flowers.description: Pink and white flowers with glowing centers that float in the air, each containing a tiny, golden, insect-like creature within its petals, arranged by the ethereal hands in a swirling pattern, symbolizing life, magic, or captured spirits, existing within a magical realm characterized by ethereal hums.

Purple Gourd.description: A dual-chambered, dark purple gourd that floats between two cliffs, glowing faintly, and later bursts into a radiant purple explosion when struck, causing a powerful impact sound, a sustained magical energy hum, and deep, rumbling explosions.

Mountain Landscape.description: A rocky, mountainous terrain with jagged blue cliffs and a cold, overcast sky, now transformed into a radiant, golden-hued landscape with a central multicolored peak, serving as the static backdrop for the scrolling end credits.

Glowing Pink Leaf.description: A small, glowing pink leaf with visible veins, plucked from the Purple-Skinned Figure’s hand by the Boy, used to strike the creature’s face with a sharp impact sound, causing it to recoil in pain, and later held aloft by the Boy to confront the Regal Woman.

Boy.description: A young boy with black hair styled in twin buns adorned with a pink flower, wearing a green top and pink loincloth, extending his arm forward with a glowing pink orb emanating from his hand, displaying fierce determination, his actions accompanied by high-pitched shouts and whoosh sounds.

Golden Object.description: A golden, spiral-handled object held by the Boy, which emits a bright blue beam of light with a powerful charging sound when activated, used to strike the Purple Gourd and later to summon the Glowing Pink Leaf, indicating its magical power and importance in the ritual to free the Child in Ice.

Ethereal Hands.description: Translucent, pale blue hands with long, pink-tipped nails that emerge from the surface of the glowing blue crystal, gently caressing the air and plucking floating flowers, suggesting a manifestation of the crystal’s consciousness or magical power, appearing in a realm underscored by ethereal hums and shimmering magical sounds.

Cavern Interior.description: A dim, foreboding cavern with jagged blue rocky walls, illuminated by faint light, creating an eerie, magical atmosphere, serving as the setting for the confrontation between the Boy and the Purple-Skinned Figure, filled with echoes, impacts, and the powerful sounds of an explosion.

Purple-Skinned Figure.description: A grotesque, purple-skinned, horned creature with a wide, red mouth, initially lying on a blue, cloud-like surface, clutching a golden, spiral-handled object. It is stirred and angered by the Boy’s actions, reacting with guttural roars, high-pitched shrieks, distorted vocalizations of pain, and possibly mournful wails after the explosion.

Glowing Blue Crystal.description: A large, suspended blue crystal hanging from the cave ceiling, emitting a soft, eerie light that illuminates the dark cavern and the elderly man below, now revealed as a source of mysterious energy emanating from a crevice in the cliffside, and later shown as a block of ice encasing a child, existing in a magical realm with ethereal hums.

Calabash Brothers.description: Seven animated children, each with a distinct colored top (blue, green, red, yellow, pink, orange, purple) and pink loincloth, standing atop a lotus-shaped platform with flame-like petals, emerging from a radiant explosion, displaying fierce, determined expressions as they prepare for battle, their appearance marked by joyful children's laughter and a distinct 'boing' sound.

Credit Text.description: Red Chinese characters listing production roles such as producers, directors, writers, and composers, displayed sequentially over the mountain backdrop, indicating the film’s production team, now shown in white text scrolling upward in vertical columns.

Dolby Digital Logo.description: A white rectangular logo with the text 'DOLBY DIGITAL' in bold, appearing at the bottom center of the screen, indicating the film’s audio format, which is underscored by the dramatic orchestral score and soaring female choral vocals heard throughout the credits.

Post-Production Support Text.description: White Chinese text listing institutions such as '上海市动漫公共技术服务平台' (Shanghai Animation Public Technology Service Platform) and '北京电影学院数字媒体研究所' (Beijing Film Academy Digital Media Research Institute), indicating technical collaboration for post-production.

Shanghai Film Studio Logo.description: White Chinese characters reading '上海电影技术厂' (Shanghai Film Technology Factory) displayed at the bottom of the screen, signifying the film’s production and printing facility.

raw_segments: The sequence opens with the Boy, wearing a green top and pink loincloth with a pink flower in his hair, standing defiantly on a rocky outcrop in a cold, mountainous landscape. Intense, dramatic music with foreign chanting, including a clear call to 'Exterminate the demon!', accompanies his fierce expression as he confronts an unseen threat. The camera zooms in on his determined eyes, then cuts to a wide shot showing him leaping across jagged cliffs, grunting with exertion ('Hoi! Hoi!'), narrowly avoiding falling debris. He lands on a ledge, raises his fists in triumph with a powerful exclamation, and then lifts a massive boulder above his head with superhuman strength, showcasing his power with further grunts. The scene shifts to a dark cavern where a grotesque, purple-skinned, horned figure lies asleep, clutching a golden spiral-handled object. As the Boy approaches, he uses a glowing pink leaf to strike the figure, eliciting a sharp impact sound and a guttural roar/scream from the creature, causing it to recoil in pain with high-pitched shrieks and distorted vocalizations. The Boy then activates the golden object, which emits a blue beam with a powerful charging sound, striking a dark purple gourd hanging from a vine. The gourd explodes in a radiant purple blast, accompanied by a loud 'BOOM!' and shockwaves that send debris flying through the cavern. The explosion clears the area, revealing a hidden path, as the Boy, now holding the glowing pink leaf aloft, stands triumphantly amidst the sounds of settling debris and a mournful wail, possibly from the injured figure. The environment transitions from icy peaks to a dark, foreboding cavern, then to a glowing, magical realm with floating flowers and ethereal hands, underscored by an ethereal hum and shimmering magical sounds, suggesting a shift from physical struggle to mystical transformation. The Boy’s deliberate and powerful actions, accompanied by the dramatic soundscape, emphasize his role as a hero confronting ancient, magical forces.

The sequence begins with a close-up of a young boy, the Boy, in a dynamic pose, extending his arm forward as if casting a spell, a glowing pink orb emanating from his hand against a dark, rocky background. His action is accompanied by a high-pitched shout and a whoosh sound, underscored by intense, building orchestral music. The scene quickly transitions to a wide shot of jagged, purple-hued mountains under a pale sky, where a small, dark purple gourd floats between two cliffs, glowing faintly. Another high-pitched shout is heard just before a powerful impact sound and a sustained, high-pitched magical energy hum. As the gourd descends into a narrow crevice, a deep, rumbling explosion erupts, followed by a massive, echoing explosion with a deep boom and shimmering sounds, as a vibrant, multicolored energy burst erupts from within, illuminating the dark rock walls with swirling hues of green, yellow, orange, and red. The powerful energy release sound fades slightly, replaced by a more ethereal, magical hum. This explosion gives way to the emergence of the Calabash Brothers—seven animated children, each wearing a distinct colored top and pink loincloth—leaping from the rocky cliffs in unison, their arms raised in a powerful, synchronized gesture. Their appearance is accompanied by joyful children's laughter and a distinct 'boing' sound, followed by a quick whoosh and thump. They gather mid-air, forming a tight, heroic cluster, before descending together toward the glowing crevice. The camera pulls back to reveal the full mountain landscape, now bathed in warm golden light, with the central peak glowing with the same radiant colors as the energy burst. The music shifts to a majestic, soaring orchestral theme, conveying wonder and triumph. The scene settles into a wide, panoramic view of the mountain range, where Chinese credit text appears sequentially in red characters over the landscape, listing production roles such as producers, directors, writers, and composers. Throughout this, a female vocalist begins singing in Mandarin, her clear, emotional voice accompanied by the majestic orchestral music, as the glowing peak remains the focal point, symbolizing the birth of the Calabash Brothers and the beginning of their journey.

The segment opens with a static, painted mountain landscape, featuring a central jagged peak with a vibrant, multicolored top shifting from pink to orange to deep blue, set against a golden-hued, rocky terrain under a soft, overcast sky. White Chinese characters, listing production roles such as directors, animators, composers, and voice actors, scroll upward in vertical columns on either side of the mountain. As the text ascends, revealing names associated with animation design, cinematography, sound effects, and music, a powerful and emotional female choir sings in Chinese, creating a ceremonial and reflective atmosphere. The music is operatic in style, characterized by soaring, poignant vocals that evoke a sense of grandeur and finality, perfectly complementing the visual mood of closure. The lighting remains consistent, emphasizing the warm, earthy tones of the landscape. Towards the end, technical credits for post-production support, including institutions like the Shanghai Animation Public Technology Service Platform and Beijing Film Academy Digital Media Research Institute, appear, followed by the Dolby Digital logo and the Shanghai Film Studio logo at the bottom, all underscored by the continuing, evocative choral performance. The entire scene marks the film's narrative conclusion, with the music enhancing the sense of acknowledgment and farewell.

The segment opens with a static, painted mountain landscape, featuring a prominent multicolored peak in hues of pink, orange, purple, and blue, set against a golden-hued, rocky terrain under a warm, overcast sky, evoking a serene and stylized mythical atmosphere. Over this backdrop, white Chinese characters scroll vertically from bottom to top, listing production credits including post-production support, mixing, printing, and acknowledgements for various institutions such as the Shanghai Animation Public Technology Service Platform, Beijing Film Academy Digital Media Research Institute, Shanghai Film Technology Factory, Shanghai Film (Group) Company, Shanghai Media Group, and Shanghai Art Film Studio. Throughout this visual display, a dramatic and emotional orchestral score plays, characterized by soaring, wordless female choral vocals, strings, and a grand, ethereal quality, perfectly complementing the fantastical visuals. The Dolby Digital logo is visible centrally, indicating the high-quality audio format. The credits continue to scroll as the powerful music slowly fades out, and the screen eventually fades to black, marking the end of the sequence in silence.

global_entity_library.Title Card: Bold red calligraphy of '葫芦兄弟' (Calabash Brothers) with English subtitle, overlaid on the mountain scene with the seven characters. The title is reinforced by the energetic theme song, which features a children's choir singing 'Húlu Xiōngdì' as the title appears.
global_entity_library.Film Permit Logo: A red square emblem with a dragon motif and Chinese text indicating official film approval, displayed on a dark green background.
global_entity_library.Production Company Text: White Chinese characters on black background listing Shanghai Film (Group) Company, Shanghai Media Group, and Shanghai Art Film Studio as joint producers.

global_entity_library.Crab-Like Monster: A large, blue, armored creature with a segmented shell and multiple limbs, standing beside the Regal Woman, displaying a fierce expression and roaring in anger, later seen retreating into the shadows, emitting loud, guttural 'Thong ah!' roars, and echoing the Regal Woman's declaration, 'You can't escape!' (你们跑不了了!).
global_entity_library.Glowing Gourd: A dual-chambered, orange-glowing gourd that emits radiant energy, now shown as part of a series of colorful gourds (orange, yellow, red) hanging from the vine, each glowing with inner light and expressive faces, later shown as a single dark purple gourd that bursts into energy when struck by the Boy’s blue beam.
global_entity_library.Elderly Man: An old man with a long white beard, wearing a brown tunic with a yellow sash and a striped vest, standing in a dark cavern with a deeply worried expression, holding a glowing blue orb and later a radiant, multi-colored lotus-shaped bowl, which he activates with both hands, causing it to emit bright sparks and light, and making soft, worried 'huh huh' sounds.
global_entity_library.Deer-Like Creature: A small, red-furred creature with white spots and large eyes, shown leaping in alarm from a rocky outcrop in the icy mountains, emitting a high-pitched, distressed wail.
global_entity_library.Purple Energy Blast: A sudden, radiant purple explosion emanating from the dark purple gourd when activated by the Boy, streaking across the cavern and startling nearby creatures, indicating a powerful magical attack, accompanied by a powerful 'Poom!' sound.
global_entity_library.White Bird: A small, white bird with a red crest, flying near the ledge where the Elderly Man is deposited, observing the scene with alert eyes.
global_entity_library.Glowing Blue Crystal: A large, suspended blue crystal hanging from the cave ceiling, emitting a soft, eerie light that illuminates the dark cavern and the elderly man below, now revealed as a source of mysterious energy emanating from a crevice in the cliffside, and later shown as a block of ice encasing a child, existing in a magical realm with ethereal hums.
global_entity_library.Glowing Brazier: An ornate, dark-colored brazier with a flame that emits a vibrant green light with a blue, lotus-shaped core, suspended on a stone platform in a dark cavern, reacting to the magical energy transfer and glowing with intricate patterns.
global_entity_library.Glowing Blue Orb: A small, spherical object with a deep blue glow, held gently in the Elderly Man’s hands, pulsing with light as it is transferred, and later used to activate the glowing bowl, which transforms into a radiant, multi-colored lotus-shaped object with flame-like petals.
global_entity_library.Glowing Leaf: A small, green leaf with visible veins that glows with an ethereal light after being scattered by the explosion, is picked up by the Elderly Man, placed into the Brazier, and then levitates above it before vanishing, suggesting magical properties.
global_entity_library.Wooden Bucket: A rustic, brown wooden bucket with metal bands and a handle, placed on a rocky surface, being struck by a blue energy blast and spraying water, suggesting a symbolic or magical interaction.
global_entity_library.Vine: A large, arched green vine with broad leaves and curling tendrils, growing over a rocky archway and bearing colorful gourds, including a single dark purple gourd that glows faintly before bursting into bright, swirling energy with a distinct magical sound, which the Regal Woman affectionately calls 'Guluwa,' 'good child,' 'my darling,' and 'this black gourd,' emphasizing its power and her desire for it to grow.
global_entity_library.Colorful Gourds: A series of gourds in blue and purple, hanging from the vine, each glowing with inner light and appearing to possess magical properties, with the blue gourd bursting into water.
global_entity_library.Rabbit-Like Creature: A small, blue-furred, rabbit-like creature with pointed ears, large eyes, and a long snout, wearing an orange tunic with a green collar and black wristbands, holding a trident with a blue spearhead. It reacts with a high-pitched gasp, then speaks with an assertive female voice, challenging the Elderly Man's abilities. It later emits mocking evil laughter, but then cries out in a panicked female voice, realizing they've been tricked, and lets out a high-pitched shriek as the glowing bowl's power intensifies.
global_entity_library.Frog-Like Creature: A small, green frog with large eyes, sitting atop a lily pad in the pond, appearing calm and observant, and emitting distinct 'ribbit' sounds.
global_entity_library.Red Beam: A bright red beam emitted from the Regal Woman’s hand, striking the Boy and causing his defeat, indicating a magical or offensive power, now used to shatter the Glowing Bowl and strike the Boy, causing him to fall.
global_entity_library.Bats: Purple-winged bats flying through the dark cave with audible flapping sounds, some carrying the rabbit-like creature, adding to the eerie, supernatural atmosphere of the scene.
global_entity_library.Golden Orb: A glowing golden orb that appears in the Regal Woman’s hand, illuminating the cave and revealing hidden details, suggesting a source of magical light or power, now shown as a weapon or tool of dominance.
global_entity_library.Glowing Pink Orbs: Small, floating pink orbs that surround the Serpentine Creature during her dance, suggesting magical energy or enchantment, now swirling around her as she raises her hand, indicating a shift in magical manifestation.
global_entity_library.Spiderweb: A large, intricate web woven across the cave floor, glowing faintly with a blue hue, trapping small insect-like creatures mid-air, adding to the eerie, supernatural atmosphere of the scene, now shown trapping the Boy before he breaks free.
global_entity_library.Purple-Skinned Figure: A grotesque, purple-skinned, horned creature with a wide, red mouth, initially lying on a blue, cloud-like surface, clutching a golden, spiral-handled object. It is stirred and angered by the Boy’s actions, reacting with guttural roars, high-pitched shrieks, distorted vocalizations of pain, and possibly mournful wails after the explosion.
global_entity_library.Fire: Bright orange flames that erupt from the ground, engulfing the area and revealing the Boy’s emergence, adding urgency and magical energy to the scene, now shown behind the Calabash Brothers as they stand united.
global_entity_library.Red Bird-Like Creature: A small, red, bird-like creature with a long beak, large eyes, and a woven basket on its head, flying playfully around the Elderly Man and perching on the boy’s finger. The boy thanks it for healing his eyes, indicating its crucial role in his recovery.
global_entity_library.Insect-Like Creatures: Small, striped creatures with red eyes and black-and-yellow bodies, scurrying across icy cliffs and later falling into flames, suggesting they are either pests or magical entities being destroyed, now shown trapped in the Spiderweb.
global_entity_library.Bat-Like Creature: A small, black, bat-like creature with glowing blue eyes, a red collar, and a long, curved antenna, standing beside the Elderly Man, observing the scene with a menacing presence, and recoiling in alarm as the glowing bowl activates, emitting a high-pitched, almost squeaky sound.

global_entity_library.Snake-like Monster: A long, segmented creature with a red head, green armor, white limbs, and a large scythe, initially attacking the Boy with a loud roar, then being defeated by him after a fierce battle in the dark cavern.

global_entity_library.Ethereal Hands: Translucent, pale blue hands with long, pink-tipped nails that emerge from the surface of the glowing blue crystal, gently caressing the air and plucking floating flowers, suggesting a manifestation of the crystal’s consciousness or magical power, appearing in a realm underscored by ethereal hums and shimmering magical sounds.
